title: ranunculus roborascens
intro: Ranunculus roborascens, also known as the Robust Buttercup, is a plant species within the Ranunculaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Ranunculus roborascens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal use, although caution should be taken due to its potential toxicity.
